category_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/linkedin/Burrow describes Burrow as a monitoring companion for Apache Kafka that provides consumer lag checking.
source_facts.description says Kafka Consumer Lag Checking.
display_name_sources: Official repository heading at https://github.com/linkedin/Burrow is Burrow.
docs_sources: Official README at https://github.com/linkedin/Burrow links to the detailed GitHub wiki for configuration.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/linkedin/Burrow, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/linkedin/Burrow lists Kafka consumer lag checking, multi-cluster support, HTTP endpoints, Zookeeper offsets, and Go implementation.
